Home / Departments / Modular Construction

Modular Construction
Built for Scale

Precision-engineered off-site building solutions for commercial, residential, and industrial projects worldwide.

View Our Work Our Services
Overview

Service Overview

GMP works with multiple manufacturers across the country and selects the right ones based on project location, budget, feasibility, logistics, and more. Our modular structures are made from welded steel tubes and beams (HSS), connected using special connectors for superior strength. 60–90% of construction is completed inside factory-controlled settings, then modules are transported to the site and assembled into complete, high-performing structures.

Capabilities

What We Deliver

Volumetric Module Fabrication

Complete room-scale units built in factory-controlled conditions using welded steel tubes and beams (HSS) connected with special connectors for superior structural integrity.

FrameCAD Light Gauge Framing

Precision-cut light gauge stud walls using FrameCAD technology for consistent dimensional accuracy and rapid assembly.

Integrated MEP Systems

Rough mechanical, electrical, and plumbing installed in-factory alongside HVAC, ensuring coordinated systems before modules leave the production line.

Multi-Manufacturer Coordination

GMP works with multiple manufacturers across the country, selecting the right partners based on project location, budget, feasibility, and logistics.

Complete Interior Finishing

Factory-installed insulation, interior walls, doors, windows, paint, cabinets, fixtures, and optional furniture — modules arrive site-ready.

Exterior Cladding & Protection

Exterior cladding applied in factory, followed by shrink-wrap protection for transport and on-site storage until installation.

Featured Program

28

Day ADU Delivery

Our 28-Day ADU program pairs factory production with disciplined site logistics so homeowners and developers get permitted, livable units on an aggressive calendar.

Value

Value We Create

30–50% Faster Delivery

Parallel factory production and site work compress overall duration so you occupy sooner and reduce carrying costs.

Superior Quality Control

Factory-controlled process with repeatable inspections ensures exceptional construction quality that meets or exceeds site-built standards.

Reduced Material Waste

Controlled inventory management and recycling in the factory environment eliminates waste compared to traditional on-site construction.

Weather-Independent

60–90% of construction completed inside a factory, eliminating weather delays and protecting materials during the build process.

Minimal Site Disruption

Shortened on-site duration limits noise, traffic, and safety exposure for neighbors and ongoing operations.

50% Faster delivery vs. traditional
28 Day ADU program
100% Code-aligned factory QC
Low On-site disruption profile
Projects

Representative Projects

San Francisco, CA

Commercial Office

Core-and-shell modular office with high-performance envelope and fast tenant fit-out.

Austin, TX

Residential Complex

Large-scale housing delivered with repeatable modules and coordinated vertical transportation.

Denver, CO

Educational Facility

Campus expansion with classrooms and support spaces installed during active school terms.

Phoenix, AZ

Retail Center

Mixed-use retail and service bays assembled for speed to revenue and phased openings.

Scale certainty without sacrificing design

From first sketch to final inspection, we align manufacturing, logistics, and field teams so your modular project lands on time and on budget.

Start Your Modular Project

Field-tested perspective.

Occasional updates on modular delivery, regulated sectors, and how we partner with owners and agencies — written by the team that executes the work.
